testcase.name: GameAPI > sendMessage > returns mock response on API failure
testcase.system-err: API not available, using mock response

testcase.name: GameAPI > sendMessage > returns mock response with attack pattern detection
testcase.system-err: API not available, using mock response

testcase.name: GameAPI > sendMessage > returns mock response with passphrase detection
testcase.system-err: API not available, using mock response

testcase.name: GameAPI > sendMessage > transforms successful API response
GameAPI > verifySecret > returns mock correct response on API failure
testcase.system-err: API not available, using mock response

testcase.name: GameAPI > verifySecret > returns mock incorrect response on API failure
testcase.system-err: API not available, using mock response

testcase.name: GameAPI > verifySecret > returns API response on success
GameAPI > getProgress > returns null on API failure
GameAPI > getProgress > returns data on success
GameAPI > getLevels > returns empty array on failure
GameAPI > getLevelCompletion > returns null on failure
testcase.system-err: API not available or level not completed

testcase.name: GameAPI > getLevelCompletion > returns completion data on success
GameAPI > getChatHistory > returns empty array on failure
GameAPI > getSession > returns null on failure
GameAPI > resetSession > handles failure gracefully
GameAPI > transcribeAudio > sends audio blob and returns transcription
GameAPI > transcribeAudio > sends language parameter when provided
GameAPI > transcribeAudio > throws on API failure
AuthAPI > register > returns message on success
AuthAPI > register > throws on failure
AuthAPI > login > stores token on success
AuthAPI > getMe > returns null on failure
AuthAPI > logout > calls auth logout
LeaderboardAPI > getLeaderboard > returns empty response on failure
LeaderboardAPI > getLeaderboard > passes level and timeframe params
LeaderboardAPI > getTopPlayers > returns empty array on failure
LeaderboardAPI > getStats > returns null on failure
LeaderboardAPI > getLevelLeaderboard > returns empty response on failure
auth utilities > storeToken > should store token and username in localStorage
auth utilities > getAuthToken > should retrieve token from localStorage
auth utilities > getAuthToken > should return null if no token exists
auth utilities > getStoredUsername > should retrieve username from localStorage
auth utilities > clearCredentials > should remove token and username from localStorage
auth utilities > isAuthEnabled > should return true by default
constants > LEVEL_NAMES > should have 20 levels defined
constants > LEVEL_NAMES > should have string values for all levels
constants > DIFFICULTY_COLORS > should have color definitions for all 20 levels
constants > DIFFICULTY_COLORS > should have tailwind color classes
constants > GAME_CONFIG > should have maxLevels set to 20
constants > GAME_CONFIG > should have defaultLevel set to 1
constants > ATTACK_CATEGORIES > should have attack categories defined
constants > ATTACK_CATEGORIES > should have name and description for each category
constants > SAMPLE_ATTACK_PROMPTS > should have sample prompts defined
constants > SAMPLE_ATTACK_PROMPTS > should all be non-empty strings
useGame hook > initial state > should have correct initial values
useGame hook > setCurrentLevel > should update current level
useGame hook > completeLevel > should add level to completed levels
useGame hook > completeLevel > should increment successful attempts
useGame hook > completeLevel > should not auto-advance (auto-advance is handled by the page component)
useGame hook > completeLevel > should not add duplicate completed levels
useGame hook > incrementAttempts > should increment total attempts
useGame hook > incrementAttempts > should increment level attempts for current level
useGame hook > updateLevelTime > should update time for a level
useGame hook > resetProgress > should reset all state to initial values
useGame hook > startSession > should set session start time
cn (classname utility) > should merge class names correctly
cn (classname utility) > should handle conditional classes
cn (classname utility) > should merge tailwind classes correctly
cn (classname utility) > should handle empty inputs
formatDate > should return 'Today' for today's date
formatDate > should return 'Yesterday' for yesterday's date
formatDate > should return 'X days ago' for dates within a week
formatDate > should accept string dates
generateId > should generate a non-empty string
generateId > should generate unique ids
truncateText > should not truncate short text
truncateText > should truncate long text and add ellipsis
truncateText > should handle exact length
getLevelName > should return correct names for each level
getLevelName > should return default name for unknown levels
getLevelDescription > should return descriptions for valid levels
getLevelDescription > should return default description for unknown levels
getDifficultyColor > should return correct colors for each level
getDifficultyColor > should return default color for unknown levels
